@@ -4,6 +4,96 @@
     "author": "Abhay08",
     "url": "https://x.com/Abhay08/status/2010300670730293693"
   },
+  {
+    "quote": "Go down the @clawdbot rabbit hole",
+    "author": "theshivpat",
+    "url": "https://x.com/theshivpat/status/2010440712941408752"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "I've been saying for like six months that even if LLMs suddenly stopped improving, we could spend *years* discovering new transformative uses. @clawdbot feels like that kind of \"just had to glue all the parts together\" leap forward. Incredible experience.",
+    "author": "markjaquith",
+    "url": "https://x.com/markjaquith/status/2010430366944055433"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Got Clawdbot set up and now I have an AI assistant named Claudia who lives in Telegram, remembers everything I tell her, and can actually *do* stuff. She just wrote this tweet. Meta? Maybe. Cool? Absolutely.",
+    "author": "darrwalk",
+    "url": "https://x.com/darrwalk/status/2010426677730660603"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "having a personal agent is incredible",
+    "author": "bffmike",
+    "url": "https://x.com/bffmike/status/2010425227898142724"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "2026 is already the year of personal agents.",
+    "author": "chrisdietr",
+    "url": "https://x.com/chrisdietr/status/2010555854613803198"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Essentially - you can automate almost anything you can do on the machine it sits on",
+    "author": "aus_bytes",
+    "url": "https://x.com/aus_bytes/status/2010463830049161441"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot is Jarvis. It already exists.",
+    "author": "nofil_ai",
+    "url": "https://x.com/nofil_ai/status/2010460892576788958"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "everything just worked first time and it combined tools in unexpected ways and even added skills and made edits to its own prompt that were hot-reloaded",
+    "author": "hey_zilla",
+    "url": "https://x.com/hey_zilla/status/2010450591815016601"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Nano banana and RSS parsing set up in my @clawdbot assistant",
+    "author": "rafadc",
+    "url": "https://x.com/rafadc/status/2010498529106530814"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "use @clawdbot",
+    "author": "victorpaycro",
+    "url": "https://x.com/victorpaycro/status/2010494516889841743"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot is crazy",
+    "author": "BLUECOW009",
+    "url": "https://x.com/BLUECOW009/status/2010474009218142252"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This lobster is gonna take over the world",
+    "author": "alex_here_now",
+    "url": "https://x.com/alex_here_now/status/2010473539514904746"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "yeah i think you want @clawdbot",
+    "author": "alex_here_now",
+    "url": "https://x.com/alex_here_now/status/2010438793430708714"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "looks dope as an AI assistant love it's platform/os agnostic, trying right away",
+    "author": "SaidAitmbarek",
+    "url": "https://x.com/SaidAitmbarek/status/2010467696828453178"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawdbot is goated :)",
+    "author": "SaidAitmbarek",
+    "url": "https://x.com/SaidAitmbarek/status/2010449059656695840"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "my @clawdbot added Antigravity auth to @zeddotdev based on how it itself authenticates with Antigravity. I now have infinite tokens and Zed's speed",
+    "author": "rovensky",
+    "url": "https://x.com/rovensky/status/2010502486272979301"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Since you are enjoying it, also try @clawdbot - it is quite magical and pulls you in more and more as you use it. (not affiliated, just enjoy using the product).",
+    "author": "The_Global_Soul",
+    "url": "https://x.com/The_Global_Soul/status/2010498518855913731"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawdbot built me a simple Stumbleupon for some of my favourite articles. http://Stumblereads.com From my phone, while putting my baby to sleep...",
+    "author": "vallver",
+    "url": "https://x.com/vallver/status/2010508094313263502"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "I got up and running today with @clawdbot and its been nothing short of an iPhone moment for me. Thanks @steipete for creating this first true personal assistant experience for us - it's magical!",
     "author": "dajaset",
